summary: Tested Photographer Session Navigation features. Found and fixed a bug in PhotographerBookingsManager.js where the auto-scroll to highlighted session had a race condition - the code checked for ref existence before switching tabs, but refs are only populated after tab switch. Fixed by splitting into two useEffects: first switches to 'confirmed' tab, second scrolls after render.

integration_issues.issue: Race condition: code checked sessionRefs before switching tabs, but refs only exist after tab renders bookings - FIXED

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/PhotographerBookingsManager.js - Fixed auto-scroll useEffect race condition by splitting into two effects
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photographer session navigation now works correctly. Feed.js navigates photographers to /photographer/bookings?session={id} and surfers to /bookings?tab=scheduled&session={id}. PhotographerBookingsManager auto-switches to 'confirmed' tab and scrolls to highlighted session with pink ring animation.

SessionCountdownWidget_surfer_navigation.details: View Session Details navigates surfers to /bookings?tab=scheduled&session={id}

SessionCountdownWidget_photographer_navi.details: Feed.js checks isPhotographer and navigates to /photographer/bookings?session={id}

PhotographerBookingsManager_auto_switch_.details: Automatically switches to 'confirmed' tab when session parameter present

PhotographerBookingsManager_auto_scroll.details: Scrolls to highlighted booking after tab switch and render

Highlighted_booking_pink_ring.details: Booking has ring-2 ring-pink-400 ring-offset-2 styling when highlighted

Surfer_bookings_highlight.details: Surfer bookings page shows ring-cyan-400 highlight on session

bug_fixed.root_cause: Original useEffect checked sessionRefs.current[highlightedSessionId] before switching tabs, but refs are only populated when filteredBookings renders the booking cards. Since filteredBookings only shows bookings for the active tab, the ref wouldn't exist until after the tab switch.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Split into two useEffects: (1) First effect switches to 'confirmed' tab when highlightedSessionId is present, (2) Second effect scrolls to the session after tab switch and bookings render
